headline: Oracle’s New AWS Partnership Just Put It Ahead of Azure and Google Cloud
summary: Cloud customers today refuse to bet everything on one provider. They run AI models across platforms, keep regulated data in one spot, and tap the best tools wherever they live. headline: Oracle and AWS Collaborate to Expand Multicloud Networking
summary: Oracle plans to expand its multicloud networking capabilities to provide customers with enterprise-grade, high-performance connectivity between Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI) and AWS. By establishing connectivity between Oracle Interconnect and AWS Interconnect–multicloud customers will have access to a fast, private, managed connection to run applications and move data seamlessly between OCI and AWS.
